pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path

mac.step1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
mac.step3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
mac.step4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.

windows.step1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
windows.step2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
windows.step3: Copy the path, then paste here.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

agentConfigHelp.dangerouslyBypassSandbox: Run Codex without sandbox restrictions. Required for filesystem/network access.
agentConfigHelp.search: Enable Codex web search capability during runs.
agentConfigHelp.fastMode: Enable Codex Fast mode. This burns credits/tokens much faster and is supported on GPT-5.4 and manual Codex model IDs.
agentConfigHelp.workspaceStrategy: How Paperclip should realize an execution workspace for this agent. Keep project_primary for normal cwd execution, or use git_worktree for issue-scoped isolated checkouts.
agentConfigHelp.workspaceBaseRef: Base git ref used when creating a worktree branch. Leave blank to use the resolved workspace ref or HEAD.
agentConfigHelp.workspaceBranchTemplate: Template for naming derived branches. Supports {{issue.identifier}}, {{issue.title}}, {{agent.name}}, {{project.id}}, {{workspace.repoRef}}, and {{slug}}.
agentConfigHelp.worktreeParentDir: Directory where derived worktrees should be created. Absolute, ~-prefixed, and repo-relative paths are supported.
agentConfigHelp.runtimeServicesJson: Optional workspace runtime service definitions. Use this for shared app servers, workers, or other long-lived companion processes attached to the workspace.
agentConfigHelp.maxTurnsPerRun: Maximum number of agentic turns (tool calls) per heartbeat run.
agentConfigHelp.command: The command to execute (e.g. node, python).
agentConfigHelp.localCommand: Override the path to the CLI command you want the adapter to call (e.g. /usr/local/bin/claude, codex, opencode).
agentConfigHelp.extraArgs: Extra CLI arguments for local adapters, comma-separated.
agentConfigHelp.envVars: Environment variables injected into the adapter process. Use plain values or secret references.
agentConfigHelp.bootstrapPrompt: Only sent when Paperclip starts a fresh session. Use this for stable setup guidance that should not be repeated on every heartbeat.
agentConfigHelp.payloadTemplateJson: Optional JSON merged into remote adapter request payloads before Paperclip adds its standard wake and workspace fields.
agentConfigHelp.webhookUrl: The URL that receives POST requests when the agent is invoked.
agentConfigHelp.heartbeatInterval: Run this agent automatically on a timer. Useful for periodic tasks like checking for new work.
agentConfigHelp.timeoutSec: Maximum seconds a run can take before being terminated. 0 means no timeout.
agentConfigHelp.graceSec: Seconds to wait after sending interrupt before force-killing the process.
agentConfigHelp.wakeOnDemand: Allow this agent to be woken by assignments, API calls, UI actions, or automated systems.
agentConfigHelp.cooldownSec: Minimum seconds between consecutive heartbeat runs.
agentConfigHelp.maxConcurrentRuns: Maximum number of heartbeat runs that can execute simultaneously for this agent.
agentConfigHelp.maxTurnContinuationEnabled: Automatically queue bounded continuation runs when an adapter stops because its per-run turn cap was exhausted.
agentConfigHelp.maxTurnContinuationMaxAttempts: Maximum automatic continuations after one max-turn stop. This is separate from max turns per run.
agentConfigHelp.maxTurnContinuationDelaySec: Seconds to wait before starting each max-turn continuation.
agentConfigHelp.budgetMonthlyCents: Monthly spending limit in cents. 0 means no limit.
